message:
Add async file I/O and improve polyfills

- Implement async file I/O host bridge (edgebox_file module)
  - read_start, write_start, poll, result_len, result, free functions
  - Non-blocking file operations with request ID tracking
  - Error handling with proper POSIX error codes

- Add WASM native bindings for async file operations
  - nativeFileReadStart, nativeFileWriteStart
  - nativeFilePoll, nativeFileGetResult

- Update fs polyfill async methods to use true async API
  - readFile and writeFile use poll-based async with setTimeout
  - Falls back to sync if async API not available

- Add WebAssembly polyfill stub for code compatibility
  - Provides stub methods that return appropriate errors

- Enhance ReadableStream polyfill
  - Better state management with locked/reader tracking
  - Proper async iterator support
  - Improved tee(), pipeThrough(), pipeTo() implementations
  - Remove duplicate polyfill definition
